name: HubSpot Meetings API
description: HubSpot Meetings API — REST API for embedding and automating HubSpot scheduling links within CRM and app workflows.

seo.title: HubSpot Meetings API — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: HubSpot Meetings API: HubSpot Meetings API — REST API for embedding and automating HubSpot scheduling links within CRM and app workflows.

when_to_use: Embed HubSpot booking link in CRM-driven email sequence
Auto-create meeting in CRM from external scheduling tool
Sync HubSpot meeting data to custom reporting dashboard
Programmatic scheduling link for outbound sales automation
Meeting outcome tracking integration with deal pipeline

cons: Requires paid HubSpot seats for full use
Rate limits tighten on lower tiers
review.verdict: Solid choice if you live in HubSpot; pointless if you use any other CRM or scheduler.
review.best_for: Teams embedding HubSpot scheduling into custom CRM workflows
review.not_for: Standalone scheduling needs outside HubSpot ecosystem
